'''sanusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdrm|bdrm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdrm|bdrm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sanusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænisith|sænisith]] || [[word:sænisij|sænisij]] || [[word:sænisish|sænisish]] || [[word:sænisi|sænisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sanunusuth|sanunusuth]] || [[word:sanunusuj|sanunusuj]] || [[word:sanunusush|sanunusush]] || [[word:sanunusu|sanunusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanusuth|sanusuth]] || [[word:sanusuj|sanusuj]] || [[word:sanusush|sanusush]] || [[word:sanusu|sanusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanufsuth|sanufsuth]] || [[word:sanufsuj|sanufsuj]] || [[word:sanufsush|sanufsush]] || [[word:sanufsuf|sanufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanusuthu|sanusuthu]] || [[word:sanusuju|sanusuju]] || [[word:sanusushu|sanusushu]] || [[word:sanusuku|sanusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanusuth|sanusuth]] || [[word:sanusuj|sanusuj]] || [[word:sanusush|sanusush]] || [[word:sanusu|sanusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanusuthul|sanusuthul]] || [[word:sanusujul|sanusujul]] || [[word:sanusushul|sanusushul]] || [[word:sanusukul|sanusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanusuthuthu|sanusuthuthu]] || [[word:sanusujuju|sanusujuju]] || [[word:sanusushushu|sanusushushu]] || [[word:sanusuku|sanusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanusuthun|sanusuthun]] || [[word:sanusujun|sanusujun]] || [[word:sanusushun|sanusushun]] || [[word:sanusukun|sanusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanusuthuoro|sanusuthuoro]] || [[word:sanusujuoro|sanusujuoro]] || [[word:sanusushuoro|sanusushuoro]] || [[word:sanusukuoro|sanusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
